name: Stick Arena 3D
description: Embark on an unforgettable adventure through 40 different levels in this exciting 3D platform game! Test your skills by defeating enemies and explore the mysterious world. A visually impressive and strategically challenging experience awaits you. Are you ready? Your adventure begins!
instructions: You can use the ARROW KEYS or W A D to move You can use the LEFT CLICK button on your mouse to shoot
